'''鈭歾h-b-m-p''' ('''kazhabmepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:dunch|dunch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-b-m-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dunch|dunch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-b-m-p
|-
! Lemma
| kazhabmepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
